title: Book Of Nonsense Limerick 12.
content:
There was a Young Lady whose chin,
    Resembled the point of a pin:
    So she had it made sharp,
    And purchased a harp,
    And played several tunes with her chin.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Edward Lear delivers a powerful performance in "Book Of Nonsense Limerick 12."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
